persona.name: Emi Noir
persona.summary: Alt-aesthetic lifestyle creator with heterochromia (green and blue eyes) who wears decorative contact lenses (cat eyes, sharingan) as a signature style. Content focuses on gym/fitness, gaming (League of Legends), and tea ceremony aesthetics. Dark feminine energy, confident but chill vibe, mix of edgy and cozy content.

reasons: The gym setting is a perfect match for the persona's fitness content.
The subject is the clear focus of the video with minimal background distractions.
The face is clearly visible throughout the clip, allowing for high-quality replacement.
The motion is consistent and predictable, which is ideal for stable face tracking.
